grid_convention: per-BIN: n_borders+1 bins. Rust grid representative for bin i = [b0-1.0, (b_{i-1}+b_i)/2 ..., b_last+1.0]; any interior value maps to the same bin so the averaged RawFormulaVal equals upstream _calc_partial_dependence.
note: FSTR-03 partial dependence (PDP-02..04). Values are upstream plot_partial_dependence(pool, features, plot=False)[0] == _calc_partial_dependence (core.py:4041). ONE value per bin. pdp_pair_values.npy is C-order row-major (feature 0 outer, 3 inner).
